title: UnCaffeinated
description: FPS Boost & QOL modpack. Based on Caffeine, which is based on adrenaline. and stuff. Icon is Color-Changed Caffeine's icon.
body:
![Banner for UnCaffeinated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f23dd6446868a4ef55bc6392e89b685efb700fe6.png)

-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=--=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

**UnCaffeinated is a modpack that builds on Caffeinated, adding some cool extras while still focusing on performance. It combines useful tweaks, optimizations, and a few fun features to give you a better Minecraft experience. If you want your game to run fast while still having some added features, UnCaffeinated is the way to go. It’s all about enhancing your gameplay without slowing things down.
**
